product.name: ProofDesk
product.intent: Give non-technical builders clear visibility and confidence from idea to accepted functionality.

sourceOfTruth: docs/ProofDesk v1 — Agent Build & Release Brief.md

discoveryEpics.name: Capability Visibility
discoveryEpics.description: Make product scope visible as a living hierarchy, not a static backlog.
discoveryEpics.productGoal: Users instantly understand what exists and where it belongs.
discoveryEpics.userValue: Fast orientation without reading code or tickets.
discoveryEpics.notes: First trust moment when opening the product.

discoveryEpics.name: Function Inspection
discoveryEpics.description: Let users inspect one function deeply with clear product context.
discoveryEpics.productGoal: Turn scope visibility into behavioral understanding.
discoveryEpics.userValue: Confidence in what each function does and why it matters.
discoveryEpics.notes: Function remains the key operational unit.

discoveryEpics.name: Validation Cockpit
discoveryEpics.description: Provide clear test visibility and low-friction validation paths.
discoveryEpics.productGoal: Move from seen scope to verified behavior.
discoveryEpics.userValue: Validation without terminal usage or tooling overhead.
discoveryEpics.notes: API and guided UI checks are both relevant.

discoveryEpics.name: Status and Acceptance Flow
discoveryEpics.description: Track progress and acceptance in plain language.
discoveryEpics.productGoal: Make release-relevant truth visible and understandable.
discoveryEpics.userValue: Clear overview of what is ready and what is blocked.

discoveryEpics.name: Release Handoff to Agent
discoveryEpics.description: Bridge validated acceptance into safe, explicit release intent.
discoveryEpics.productGoal: Support human-in-the-loop release without git knowledge.

discoveryEpics.name: Local-First State and Portability
discoveryEpics.description: Keep data local, editable, and portable across sessions.
discoveryEpics.productGoal: No backend required for core product value.
discoveryEpics.notes: Seed JSON -> runtime state -> local persistence -> export JSON.

discoveryEpics.name: Non-Technical UX Confidence
discoveryEpics.description: Design for vibe coders and product owners first.
discoveryEpics.productGoal: High clarity with low technical tolerance requirements.
discoveryEpics.userValue: Users remain in control without becoming engineers.

discoveryEpics.name: Extensible Without Bloat
discoveryEpics.description: Prepare a clean path for growth without enterprise sprawl.
discoveryEpics.productGoal: Stay lightweight while enabling future capabilities.
discoveryEpics.userValue: Product can evolve without losing simplicity.

discoveryFeatures.name: Capability Map Overview
discoveryFeatures.description: Show Epic -> Feature -> Function in one scan-friendly structure.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User sees product scope within seconds.
candidateFunctionHints: render hierarchical epic-feature-function tree
support selecting one function from hierarchy

discoveryFeatures.name: Hierarchy Navigation and Context
discoveryFeatures.description: Help users move between epic, feature, and function without losing context.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: No confusion about where the selected item belongs.
candidateFunctionHints: show epic-feature breadcrumb for selected function
keep selection stable while filtering

discoveryFeatures.name: Top Summary Signals
discoveryFeatures.description: Expose lightweight counters for progress at a glance.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User sees total, ready, passed, failed, accepted quickly.
candidateFunctionHints: compute summary metrics from function statuses
render compact summary cards

discoveryFeatures.name: Search and Filtering
discoveryFeatures.description: Allow users to narrow scope by name, status, and tags.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User finds relevant scope fast.
discoveryFeatures.whyItMatters: As scope grows, discoverability becomes essential.
candidateFunctionHints: search by function name, feature, epic, tags
filter by acceptance/test/dev status

discoveryFeatures.name: Function Detail Context
discoveryFeatures.description: Show function name, short/long description, and status context.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User understands what the selected function is about.
candidateFunctionHints: display selected function details
show status fields in detail panel

discoveryFeatures.name: Expected Behavior, Risks, and Tags
discoveryFeatures.description: Expose why a function matters and what can go wrong.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User can evaluate confidence and uncertainty.
candidateFunctionHints: render expected behavior section
show known risks and tags with optional fallbacks

discoveryFeatures.name: Linked Test Case Visibility
discoveryFeatures.description: Show all test cases attached to the selected function.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User understands what validation coverage exists.
candidateFunctionHints: display linked test case list
show testType, executionType, lastResult, lastRunAt

discoveryFeatures.name: API Validation Path
discoveryFeatures.description: Provide direct API validation flow from function context.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User can validate API behavior without external tooling.
candidateFunctionHints: open API test runner from selected test case
show input, output, and validation result

discoveryFeatures.name: UI Validation Path
discoveryFeatures.description: Guide manual UI verification with explicit steps and expected outcomes.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User can verify UI behavior with structured guidance.
discoveryFeatures.whyItMatters: Many checks remain human-observed in v1.
candidateFunctionHints: show manual test steps
capture pass/fail decision and notes

discoveryFeatures.name: Status Badge Language
discoveryFeatures.description: Render dev/test/acceptance statuses with consistent visual meaning.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User can scan state quickly across list and detail.
candidateFunctionHints: render status chips in hierarchy rows
reuse same status chips in detail panel

discoveryFeatures.name: Acceptance Decision Capture
discoveryFeatures.description: Capture explicit acceptance decisions per function.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User can move functions from review to accepted/rejected clearly.
candidateFunctionHints: allow acceptance status updates in function detail
track acceptance state changes in runtime

discoveryFeatures.name: Blocking Visibility
discoveryFeatures.description: Show what is still blocking readiness and why.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User can target the next meaningful validation action.
candidateFunctionHints: list high-priority functions not yet accepted
show plain-language blocking reasons

discoveryFeatures.name: Release Readiness Panel
discoveryFeatures.description: Summarize readiness state from function-level acceptance truth.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User knows whether release is not ready, almost ready, or ready.
discoveryFeatures.whyItMatters: Bridges validation work into shipping confidence.
candidateFunctionHints: compute ready-for-commit indicator
show readiness reason and blocking count

discoveryFeatures.name: Approve for Release Trigger
discoveryFeatures.description: Allow explicit approval when release conditions are met.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User controls the final ship decision.
candidateFunctionHints: enable approval action only when readiness is met
persist approved_for_release flag

discoveryFeatures.name: Agent-Readable State Contract
discoveryFeatures.description: Export machine-readable state for agent release automation.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: No terminal/Git complexity required for user.
discoveryFeatures.whyItMatters: Connects product acceptance to agent action safely.
candidateFunctionHints: export current state JSON contract
include function status and approval truth data

discoveryFeatures.name: Seed to Runtime Alignment
discoveryFeatures.description: Load baseline seed into runtime domain objects for immediate orientation.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: Product feels complete on first open.
candidateFunctionHints: map seed JSON into typed domain model
handle optional discovery fields safely
discoveryFeatures.notes: Discovery and execution data stay distinct but mappable.

discoveryFeatures.name: Local Runtime Persistence
discoveryFeatures.description: Persist runtime choices and edits locally between sessions.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User can continue where they left off.
candidateFunctionHints: save runtime state in localStorage
restore with robust fallback for shape drift

discoveryFeatures.name: State Import/Export
discoveryFeatures.description: Move ProofDesk state across environments via JSON.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User can share or restore project state without backend.
candidateFunctionHints: export runtime state as JSON file
import and validate JSON state payload

discoveryFeatures.name: Plain-Language Product Copy
discoveryFeatures.description: Use product-language labels and guidance over engineering jargon.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: User understands actions immediately.
candidateFunctionHints: convert status/action copy to plain language
provide concise contextual helper text

discoveryFeatures.name: Journey Orientation Cues
discoveryFeatures.description: Show users where they are in inspect -> validate -> accept journey.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: Users keep momentum with clear next step.
candidateFunctionHints: surface current stage for selected function
highlight recommended next action

discoveryFeatures.name: Recovery-Friendly States
discoveryFeatures.description: Graceful empty and error handling with plain-language recovery hints.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: Users can continue without feeling blocked.
discoveryFeatures.whyItMatters: Stability perception is crucial for trust.
candidateFunctionHints: show clear empty states for missing selection/data
avoid exposing raw stack traces in UI

discoveryFeatures.name: Discovery-to-Execution Bridge
discoveryFeatures.description: Enable gradual promotion of discovery items into executable functions.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: Planning context can evolve into implementation scope cleanly.
discoveryFeatures.whyItMatters: Prevents disconnect between roadmap and build map.
candidateFunctionHints: store lightweight candidateFunctionHints in discovery items
promote selected hints into execution function entities later

discoveryFeatures.name: Lightweight Extension Slots
discoveryFeatures.description: Reserve small additive extension points for near-future capabilities.
discoveryFeatures.userOutcome: Product can expand without becoming enterprise-heavy.
candidateFunctionHints: keep additive metadata fields for future evolution
preserve backward compatibility in seed contract
discoveryFeatures.notes: Guardrails against platform bloat remain active.

dependencies.reason: Function detail depends on selecting an item from the hierarchy.
Test visibility is anchored to selected function context.
Readiness summaries depend on reliable status visibility.
Approval should be gated by readiness state.
Agent handoff needs stable and portable JSON state.

futureNotes: Keep this scaffold editable and motivational; it is orientation data, not a rigid sprint backlog.
Promote discovery features to execution functions progressively when confidence is high.
Maintain plain language and local-first defaults for the Jan persona.
Avoid enterprise QA feature creep while extending capability depth.
